title: WebGuard - Security Scanner Platform
description: Built a security scanning platform for detecting WAFs, exposed services, missing security headers, and DNS misconfigurations. Implemented asynchronous scan processing using Redis and BullMQ workers with automated PDF security reporting.

title: Expense Tracker Platform
description: Developed a full stack expense management platform with premium features, leaderboard system, downloadable reports, and secure JWT authentication. Integrated Razorpay payments and AWS S3 for report storage.

title: Real-Time Group Chat Application
description: Built a scalable real-time group chat application with multimedia sharing using Socket.IO and Sequelize. Designed optimized backend architecture for efficient message handling and storage.

title: AI Mental Health Assistant
description: Developed an AI-powered mental health and counselling assistant using OpenAI API and sentiment analysis to provide conversational emotional support and interaction.

title: WeatherChart - Weather Visualization App
description: Built a responsive weather dashboard displaying current weather and 5-day forecasts using OpenWeather API. Visualized weather analytics dynamically using Chart.js.
